overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a long leather coat walking through a wet residential London street at night. The character navigates sidewalks and crosses roads while passing brick townhouses, street lamps, and occasional pedestrians in a moody, atmospheric urban environment.

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a wooden fence, passing trash bags and bins

entered.detail: tall weathered wooden privacy fence running along the sidewalk
traditional brick residential building with multiple windows
tall street lamp casting yellow light on wet pavement
black trash bins and bags placed along the sidewalk
trees with yellow autumn leaves overhanging the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet residential sidewalk at night, bordered by a wooden fence on the left and brick townhouses on the right. Street lamps cast reflections on the damp pavement as the character passes trash bins and autumn trees in this quiet, empty neighborhood.

events.description: character moves from sidewalk onto the street side near parked cars
character approaches intersection with modern apartment building visible ahead

agents.ego_description: character walking along the street edge, passing parked vehicles and approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: female pedestrian in light-colored top walking past the character in the opposite direction

multi-story modern residential building with illuminated windows
metal chain link fence replacing the wooden fence

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from sidewalk to street level, passing a white parked car and chain-link fencing. A modern apartment building becomes visible in the distance as the character approaches an intersection, while a pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction.

events.description: character crosses the road from left side to right sidewalk
character turns right at the corner, navigating around street furniture

agents.ego_description: character crosses the street and navigates around the intersection, passing multiple pedestrians

group of pedestrians gathered near the corner across the street

entered.detail: red circular no-entry traffic sign on metal pole
older brick building with graffiti on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wet asphalt road at an intersection, passing red no-entry signs. After crossing, the character turns right onto a new sidewalk, encountering several pedestrians including a man walking ahead and a group gathered across the street near a graffiti-marked brick building.

black trash bins near the garden entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker, more enclosed residential courtyard with garden vegetation and outdoor seating. Following another pedestrian, the character walks past wooden benches and red cafe tables arranged on paved tiles, with trash bins visible near the garden entrance and residential buildings surrounding the quiet courtyard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet, wet residential neighborhood that gradually transitions into a more crowded urban intersection and finally into a secluded courtyard. It begins on a damp sidewalk bordered by wooden fences and brick townhouses, where street lamps cast reflections on the pavement beneath autumn trees. As the character moves toward the street, the scene opens up to reveal a parked white car and a distant modern apartment building before the camera follows the character across a wet asphalt intersection marked by red no-entry signs. The perspective then shifts toward a busier sidewalk populated by pedestrians and graffiti-marked walls before turning right into a darker, enclosed residential courtyard. Finally, the environment narrows into a quiet garden space filled with vegetation, wooden benches, and red cafe tables arranged on paved tiles.
